source_notes: 規格由来の機械構造用鋼化学成分。調達前に現行JISで確認が必要。Fe余量は列挙した主要元素から参考中点推定として表示。

properties_en: Iron-base structural steel used for machine parts and structural materials because of its balance of strength, toughness, heat-treatability, and workability.
properties_zh: 以铁为主成分的结构钢，凭借强度、韧性、热处理性和加工性的平衡用于机械零件和结构材料。
representative_makers_en: Nippon Steel, JFE Steel, Daido Steel, Aichi Steel

japanese_makers_zh: 日本制铁, JFE Steel, 大同特殊钢, 爱知制钢

name: Stainless Steel 201
usage: 耐食部材・配管・締結部品・高温部材
source_title: SAE stainless steel designations composition table
source_notes: SAE/UNSステンレス成分表。検索表示用にFe余量を計算し、列挙した主要元素から参考中点推定として表示。

usage_zh: 耐蚀部件、管道、紧固件、高温部件

properties_zh: 以Cr为主要成分的耐蚀钢，凭借耐蚀性、加工性、焊接性和耐热性的平衡用于设备和结构件。

source_notes: SAE/UNSステンレス成分表。検索表示用にFe余量を計算し、列挙した主要元素から参考中点推定として表示。
usage_en: corrosion-resistant components, piping, fasteners, high-temperature components
usage_zh: 耐蚀部件、管道、紧固件、高温部件
properties_en: Corrosion-resistant steel containing Cr as a principal element, used in equipment and structural members for its balance of corrosion resistance, formability, weldability, and heat resistance.
properties_zh: 以Cr为主要成分的耐蚀钢，凭借耐蚀性、加工性、焊接性和耐热性的平衡用于设备和结构件。
representative_makers_en: Nippon Steel, JFE Steel, Daido Steel, Aichi Steel
representative_makers_zh: Nippon Steel, JFE Steel, Daido Steel, Aichi Steel
japanese_makers_en: Nippon Steel, JFE Steel, Daido Steel, Aichi Steel
japanese_makers_zh: 日本制铁, JFE Steel, 大同特殊钢, 爱知制钢

source_notes_zh: SAE/UNS不锈钢成分表；为搜索显示计算Fe余量。铁余量按列出主要元素的参考中点估算显示。
Fe_estimate_method: balance midpoint estimate from listed major elements

source_notes: SAE/UNSステンレス成分表。検索表示用にFe余量を計算し、列挙した主要元素から参考中点推定として表示。
usage_en: corrosion-resistant components, piping, fasteners, high-temperature components
usage_zh: 耐蚀部件、管道、紧固件、高温部件
properties_en: Corrosion-resistant steel containing Cr as a principal element, used in equipment and structural members for its balance of corrosion resistance, formability, weldability, and heat resistance.
properties_zh: 以Cr为主要成分的耐蚀钢，凭借耐蚀性、加工性、焊接性和耐热性的平衡用于设备和结构件。
representative_makers_en: Nippon Steel, JFE Steel, Daido Steel, Aichi Steel
representative_makers_zh: Nippon Steel, JFE Steel, Daido Steel, Aichi Steel
japanese_makers_en: Nippon Steel, JFE Steel, Daido Steel, Aichi Steel
japanese_makers_zh: 日本制铁, JFE Steel, 大同特殊钢, 爱知制钢
source_notes_en: SAE/UNS stainless composition table; Fe balance calculated for search display. Iron balance shown as a reference midpoint estimate from listed major elements.
source_notes_zh: SAE/UNS不锈钢成分表；为搜索显示计算Fe余量。铁余量按列出主要元素的参考中点估算显示。
Fe_estimate_method: balance midpoint estimate from listed major elements
